title: callista macrantha
intro: Callista macrantha, also known as the large-flowered orchid or Calista, is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callista macrantha include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Callista macrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
